name: abap2UI5
description: Developing UI5 Apps Purely in ABAP.

scripts.syfixes: find . -type f -name '*.abap' -exec sed -i -e 's/ RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_sy_itab_line_not_found/ ASSERT 1 = 0/g' {} +
scripts.auto_downport: abaplint --fix .github/abaplint/abap_702.jsonc && npm run syfixes && cp -r src node/downport && cp -f .github/abaplint/abap_702.jsonc abaplint.jsonc && npm run abaplintpathfix
scripts.auto_transpile: rm -rf node/output && cp node/srv/*.abap node/downport && abap_transpile ./node/setup/abap_transpile.json
